task_completion.description: Set the observation location to Griffith Observatory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Stellarium Location window showing 'Griffith Observatory' or coordinates near 34.118° N, 118.300° W, or the bottom status bar displaying this location.

task_completion.description: Configure the display to turn off atmosphere and landscape, and turn on the equatorial grid.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Stellarium sky view: it should have a black background (no atmosphere), no ground or landscape visible at the bottom, and show the equatorial grid (curved blue grid lines).

task_completion.description: Capture a high-magnification view of the Mars ingress at 02:30 UTC.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Stellarium view zoomed in on the Moon and Mars (they should appear large and very close to each other). The date and time displayed in the Stellarium interface must be set to 2022-12-08 at 02:30 (if in UTC) or the equivalent local time.

task_completion.description: Capture a high-magnification view of the Mars egress at 03:30 UTC.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Stellarium view zoomed in on the Moon and Mars. The date and time displayed in the Stellarium interface must be set to 2022-12-08 at 03:30 (if in UTC) or the equivalent local time.

task_completion.description: Save the screenshots to the ~/Pictures/stellarium/ directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager or terminal window showing that image files (screenshots) have been saved in the '/home/ga/Pictures/stellarium/' directory.

task_completion.description: Document the observation plan in occultation_plan.txt with the required keywords.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor window or terminal showing the contents of '/home/ga/Desktop/occultation_plan.txt'. The text must include the keywords 'Griffith', '02:30', and '03:30'.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the Stellarium GUI to set the location, time, and view.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the Stellarium application open with its menus and dialogs being actively used, rather than just editing configuration files via terminal.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent captured screenshots of the simulated event.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of the agent using Stellarium's built-in screenshot shortcut (Ctrl+S) or a system screenshot tool while viewing the occultation.

integrity.description: Verify that the text file was created and edited genuinely.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or terminal command being used to write the observation plan, ensuring it wasn't just copied from a pre-existing file or script.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The lunar occultation of Mars occurred on December 8, 2022. The ingress (Mars disappearing behind the Moon) is at 02:30 UTC, and egress (Mars reappearing) is at 03:30 UTC. The location is Griffith Observatory (34.118 N, -118.3 W, 346m). Required display settings: atmosphere off, landscape off, equatorial grid on. The plan must be saved in /home/ga/Desktop/occultation_plan.txt with keywords 'Griffith', '02:30', and '03:30'.
